intended_use: The multifunctional ultrasound scanner is used to collect, display and analyze ultrasound images during ultrasound imaging procedures in combination with supported echographic probes. Main application
intended_use_full: The multifunctional ultrasound scanner is used to collect, display and analyze ultrasound images during ultrasound imaging procedures in combination with supported echographic probes. Main applications: Cardiac (Adult, Pediatric, Transesophageal), Vascular (Neonatal, Adult Cephalic, Vascular), General Imaging (Abdominal, Breast, Musculoskeletal, Neonatal, Pediatric, Small Organs, Thyroid, Urological), and Women Health (OB/Fetal, Gynecology). Primary modes: B-Mode, M-Mode, Tissue Enhancement Imaging (TEI), Multi View (MView), Doppler (PW and CW), Color Flow Mapping (CFM), Power Doppler, Tissue Velocity Mapping (TVM), Combined modes, Elastosonography, 3D/4D and CnTI.
